title: Media Programming Directors
description: Direct and coordinate activities of personnel engaged in preparation of radio or television station program schedules and programs, such as sports or news.

tasks.text: Operate and maintain on-air and production audio equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check completed program logs for accuracy and conformance with Federal Communications Commission (FCC) rules and regulations and resolve program log inaccuracies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read news, read or record public service and promotional announcements, or perform other on-air duties.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct and coordinate activities of personnel engaged in broadcast news, sports, or programming.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Monitor and review programming to ensure that schedules are met, guidelines are adhered to, and performances are of adequate quality.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Prepare copy and edit tape so that material is ready for broadcasting.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate activities between departments, such as news and programming.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Perform personnel duties, such as hiring staff and evaluating work performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish work schedules and assign work to staff members.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop promotions for current programs and specials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and schedule programming and event coverage, based on broadcast length, time availability, and other factors, such as community needs, ratings data, and viewer demographics.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Monitor network transmissions for advisories concerning daily program schedules, program content, special feeds, or program changes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop ideas for programs and features that a station could produce.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select, acquire, and maintain programs, music, films, and other needed materials and obtain legal clearances for their use as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate new and existing programming to assess suitability and the need for changes, using information such as audience surveys and feedback.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Conduct interviews for broadcasts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with directors and production staff to discuss issues, such as production and casting problems, budgets, policies, and news coverage.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review information about programs and schedules to ensure accuracy and provide such information to local media outlets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct setup of remote facilities and install or cancel programs at remote stations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop budgets for programming and broadcasting activities and monitor expenditures to ensure that they remain within budgetary limits.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Cue announcers, actors, performers, and guests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Act as a liaison between talent and directors, providing information that performers or guests need to prepare for appearances and communicating relevant information from guests, performers, or staff to directors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in the planning and execution of fundraising activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
